mapper.select: SELECT (s.total_point + COALESCE(SUM(MY_VALUE.value), 0)) AS totalPrice FROM students s LEFT JOIN (SELECT o.student_id, SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END) * COALESCE((SELECT price FROM (SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), st.publication_price) AS value FROM orders o JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.state = '체결' GROUP BY o.student_id, o.stock_no, st.publication_price) MY_VALUE ON s.student_id = MY_VALUE.student_id WHERE s.student_id = #{studentId} GROUP BY s.total_point
SELECT total_point as totalPoint FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(stock_profit), 0) AS totalProfit FROM (SELECT (SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.amount ELSE -o.amount END) * COALESCE((SELECT price FROM (SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), st.publication_price)) - SUM(CASE WHEN o.content = '매수' THEN o.price * o.amount ELSE 0 END) AS stock_profit FROM orders o JOIN stocks st ON o.stock_no = st.stock_no WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.state = #{state} GROUP BY o.stock_no, st.publication_price)
SELECT total_coupon AS totalCoupon FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT name FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) AS amount FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state}
SELECT (SUM(price * amount) / SUM(amount)) AS average FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state} AND content = #{content}
SELECT SUM(price * amount) AS purchasePrice FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = #{state} AND content = #{content}

SELECT ((SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' THEN amount ELSE -amount END) * (SELECT COALESCE((SELECT price FROM (SELECT price FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND state = '체결' ORDER BY order_date DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1), st.publication_price) FROM stocks st WHERE st.stock_no = o.stock_no)) - SUM(CASE WHEN content = '매수' THEN price * amount ELSE 0 END)) AS profit FROM orders o WHERE o.student_id = #{studentId} AND o.stock_no = #{stockNo} AND o.state = #{state} GROUP BY stock_no
SELECT DISTINCT stock_no AS stockNo FROM orders WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND state = #{state}
SELECT coupon_no, name, price FROM coupons
SELECT total_point AS totalPoint FROM students WHERE student_id=#{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO coupon_purchase (coupon_purchase_no, purchase_date, price, name, state, student_id, coupon_no) VALUES(coupon_purchase_no_seq.NEXTVAL, sysdate, #{price}, #{name}, #{state}, #{studentId}, #{couponNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - #{price}, total_coupon = total_coupon + 1 WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND total_point >= #{price}
mapper.select: SELECT name, price FROM coupon_purchase WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
SELECT content FROM news
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO students (student_id, password, name, grade, class_name, class_number, total_point, total_coupon) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{password}, #{name}, #{grade}, #{className}, #{classNumber}, 10000000, 0)
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM students WHERE student_id = #{studentId}

SELECT history_date, history_type, history_content, point_change FROM ( SELECT cp.purchase_date AS history_date, '쿠폰' AS history_type, cp.name AS history_content, -cp.price AS point_change FROM COUPON_PURCHASE cp WHERE cp.student_id = #{studentId} UNION ALL SELECT gp.get_date AS history_date, '지급' AS history_type, gp.content AS history_content, gp.point AS point_change FROM GET_POINT gp WHERE gp.student_id = #{studentId} UNION ALL SELECT t.transaction_date AS history_date, '매수' AS history_type, s.name AS history_content, -(o.price * o.amount) AS point_change FROM TRANSACTION t, ORDERS o, STOCKS s WHERE t.buy_order_no = o.order_no AND o.stock_no = s.stock_no AND o.student_id = #{studentId} UNION ALL SELECT t.transaction_date AS history_date, '매도' AS history_type, s.name AS history_content, (o.price * o.amount) AS point_change FROM TRANSACTION t, ORDERS o, STOCKS s WHERE t.sell_order_no = o.order_no AND o.stock_no = s.stock_no AND o.student_id = #{studentId} ) ORDER BY history_date DESC
SELECT name, content FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT price FROM (SELECT o.price FROM TRANSACTION t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = #{stockNo} ORDER BY t.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

SELECT price-s.prev_price FROM (SELECT o.price FROM TRANSACTION t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = #{stockNo} ORDER BY t.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC), stocks s WHERE ROWNUM = 1 AND s.stock_no = #{stockNo}

SELECT ROUND((price-s.prev_price)/s.prev_price*100) as Range FROM (SELECT o.price FROM TRANSACTION t JOIN ORDERS o ON t.buy_order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.stock_no = #{stockNo} ORDER BY t.TRANSACTION_DATE DESC), stocks s WHERE ROWNUM = 1 AND s.stock_no = #{stockNo}
SELECT prev_price FROM stocks WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (order_no, content, price, amount, state, order_date, student_id, stock_no) VALUES (order_no_seq.NEXTVAL, #{content}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{state}, SYSDATE, #{studentId}, #{stockNo})
mapper.select: SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' AND content = '매도' ORDER BY order_date ASC
SELECT price, amount, content FROM orders WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo} AND STATE = '대기' AND content = '매수' ORDER BY order_date ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point + (#{point}) WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
UPDATE students SET total_point = total_point - (#{point}) WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO transaction (transaction_no, transaction_date, buy_order_no, sell_order_no) VALUES (transaction_no_seq.NEXTVAL, SYSDATE, #{buyOrderNo}, #{sellOrderNo})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET state = '대기' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE orders SET state = '체결' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE orders SET state = '취소' WHERE order_no = #{orderNo}
UPDATE stocks SET publication_balance = publication_balance - #{amount} WHERE stock_no = #{stockNo}
mapper.select: SELECT stock_no, name FROM stocks ORDER BY stock_no
